title: ajuga boninsimae
intro: Ajuga boninsimae, also known as Bonin bugleweed or Bonin ajuga, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Ajuga, native to the Bonin Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Ajuga boninsimae is often used as a tincture or tea, and its leaves and stems can be dried and used in infusions or added to salves and ointments.
